This model should be used with a model formula so that smooth terms can be specified. See the example below.

The smoothness of the terms will need to be manually specified (e.g., using `s(x, df = 10)`) in the formula. Tuning can be accomplished using the `adjust_deg_free` parameter. Note that `mgcv::s()` and `VGAM::s()` are distinct and cannot be mixed.

When using a workflow, pass the _model formula_ to [workflows::add_model()]'s `formula` argument, and a simplified _preprocessing formula_ elsewhere.

To learn more about the differences between these formulas, see [`?model_formula`][parsnip::model_formula].
